memberdef.name: HBDecimQ15_getset
HBDecimQ15Obj_methods
memberdef.initializer:
= {
{"execute", (PyCFunction)HBDecimQ15Obj_execute, METH_VARARGS, "execute(x) -> ndarray
" "
" "Decimate a block of interleaved IQ int16 samples by 2.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import HBDecimQ15
" " >>> obj = HBDecimQ15(np.zeros(1, dtype=np.float32))
" " >>> y = obj.execute(np.zeros(4))
" " >>> y.dtype
" " dtype('int16')
"}, {"reset", (PyCFunction)HBDecimQ15Obj_reset, METH_NOARGS, "reset() -> None
" "
" "Zero all delay rings and clear the pending-sample flag.
" "
" " >>> from doppler import HBDecimQ15
" " >>> obj = HBDecimQ15(np.zeros(1, dtype=np.float32))
" " >>> obj.reset()
"}, {"destroy", (PyCFunction)HBDecimQ15Obj_destroy, METH_NOARGS, "Release resources."}, {"__enter__", (PyCFunction)HBDecimQ15Obj_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL}, {"__exit__", (PyCFunction)HBDecimQ15Obj_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL}, {NULL} }

memberdef.name: HBDecimQ15ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "filter.HBDecimQ15", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(HBDecimQ15Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)HBDecimQ15Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Allocate and initialise a fixed-point halfband 2:1 decimator.\n", .tp_methods = HBDecimQ15Obj_methods, .tp_getset = HBDecimQ15_getset, .tp_new = HBDecimQ15Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)HBDecimQ15Obj_init, }
